/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/flare.dir/external/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/flare.dir/flare/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flare.dir/flare/render/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flare.dir/flare/window/window.cpp.o -o flare  external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework QuartzCore
